$schema.description: Path to this JSON schema, enabling editor autocomplete.

fields.description: The deobfuscated stat fields, in table order.

key.description: The stat field name, e.g. Name, Armor, or Health.

value.description: The field's value, represented as text.

chunk.description: The 127-byte slot index the field belongs to, preserved so sparse tables round-trip byte-for-byte.
